LEGAL NOTICE
Date: 15 June 2026
From: Advocate Rahul Sharma Chamber No. 204, District Court, New Delhi
On behalf of: Mr. Aman Verma Flat No. 12B, Green Residency, Sector 15, Noida, Uttar Pradesh
To: Mr. Rakesh Singh Flat No. 8A, Green Residency, Sector 15, Noida, Uttar Pradesh
SUBJECT: Legal Notice for Recovery of Security Deposit and Breach of Rental Agreement
Sir,
Under instructions from and on behalf of my client, Mr. Aman Verma, I hereby serve upon you the
following legal notice:
That my client entered into a Rental Agreement with you on 10 January 2025 for the residential
premises situated at Flat No. 8A, Green Residency, Sector 15, Noida.
That my client paid a refundable security deposit of Rs. 50,000 at the commencement of the
tenancy.
That the tenancy period ended on 31 December 2025 and my client vacated the premises on the
same date after clearing all outstanding dues.
Despite repeated requests and reminders sent on 10 January 2026, 15 February 2026, and 20

same date after clearing all outstanding dues.
Despite repeated requests and reminders sent on 10 January 2026, 15 February 2026, and 20
March 2026, you have failed to return the security deposit amount.
Such conduct amounts to breach of contractual obligations and causes financial hardship to my
client.
Under the terms of the Rental Agreement, failure to refund the security deposit within thirty
days attracts a penalty of Rs. 1,000 per day.
Therefore, you are hereby called upon to pay:
a) Security Deposit: Rs. 50,000 b) Penalty Amount (till date): Rs. 75,000 c) Legal Expenses: Rs. 10,000
Total Amount Claimed: Rs. 1,35,000
You are directed to make payment within fifteen days from receipt of this notice.
Failing compliance, my client shall be constrained to initiate appropriate civil and legal
proceedings against you before the competent court at New Delhi, entirely at your risk as to
costs and consequences.
1. 
2. 
3. 
4. 
5. 
6. 
7. 
1. 
2. 
1

This notice is issued without prejudice to all other legal rights and remedies available to my client under
applicable law.
Sincerely,
Advocate Rahul Sharma
(Signature Missing)
Witness 1: _______
Witness 2: _______
2
